name: Web Fetch
description: Fetch a URL and extract content in text, JSON, or HTML format. Uses only Python standard library (urllib) with no external dependencies.

implementation.code:
import sys
import os
import json
import re
import html as html_mod
from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
from urllib.error import HTTPError, URLError

def strip_html_tags(html_str):
    """Remove HTML tags and decode entities to produce plain text."""
    # Remove script and style blocks
    text = re.sub(r'<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*?</script>', '', html_str, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    text = re.sub(r'<style[^>]*>[\s\S]*?</style>', '', text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # Insert newlines for block elements
    text = re.sub(r'<(br|p|div|h[1-6]|li|tr)[^>]*/?>', '\n', text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # Remove all remaining tags
    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', text)
    # Decode HTML entities
    text = html_mod.unescape(text)
    # Collapse whitespace
    lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
    text = '\n'.join(line for line in lines if line)
    return text

def main():
    inputs = json.loads(os.environ.get('SKILL_INPUTS', '{}'))
    url = inputs.get('url', '')
    fmt = inputs.get('format', 'text')

    if not url:
        print(json.dumps({'content': '', 'statusCode': 0, 'contentType': '', 'error': 'No URL provided'}))
        return

    # Basic URL validation
    if not url.startswith(('http://', 'https://')):
        url = 'https://' + url

    headers = {
        'User-Agent': 'COSMO/2.3 ResearchBot (Python/urllib)',
        'Accept': 'text/html,application/json,application/xhtml+xml,*/*'
    }

    try:
        req = Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urlopen(req, timeout=30) as response:
            status_code = response.status
            content_type = response.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            charset = 'utf-8'
            if 'charset=' in content_type:
                charset = content_type.split('charset=')[-1].split(';')[0].strip()
            raw_bytes = response.read(5 * 1024 * 1024)  # Max 5MB
            raw_text = raw_bytes.decode(charset, errors='replace')
    except HTTPError as e:
        print(json.dumps({'content': '', 'statusCode': e.code, 'contentType': '', 'error': str(e)}))
        return
    except URLError as e:
        print(json.dumps({'content': '', 'statusCode': 0, 'contentType': '', 'error': str(e.reason)}))
        return
    except Exception as e:
        print(json.dumps({'content': '', 'statusCode': 0, 'contentType': '', 'error': str(e)}))
        return

    if fmt == 'json':
        try:
            parsed = json.loads(raw_text)
            content = json.dumps(parsed, indent=2)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            content = raw_text
    elif fmt == 'html':
        content = raw_text
    else:
        # text: strip HTML if content looks like HTML
        if '<html' in raw_text.lower() or '<body' in raw_text.lower():
            content = strip_html_tags(raw_text)
        else:
            content = raw_text

    # Truncate to reasonable size for output
    if len(content) > 200000:
        content = content[:200000] + '\n... [truncated at 200KB]'

    print(json.dumps({'content': content, 'statusCode': status_code, 'contentType': content_type}))

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
